pwa.install_description.en: Add to home screen for quick access and offline use.
pwa.install_description.sw: Ongeza kwenye skrini ya nyumbani kwa ufikiaji wa haraka na matumizi bila mtandao.
pwa.install_description.ha: Sanya zuwa ga shafi na gida don saurin shiga da amfani a layi.
pwa.install_description.yo: Fi kun iboju ile fun irinnsisoke kiakia ati lilo airotel.
pwa.install_description.ig: Tinye n'ihü ihü  maka ighota ngwa ngwa ngwa na iji jikwaa na-enweghj netwak.
pwa.install_description.zu: Yengeza kwisikrini sase ngokufikelela okusheshayo nokusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
pwa.install_description.xh: Yongeza kwisikrini sase ngokufikelela okusheshayo nokusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
pwa.install_description.af: Voeg by tuisskerm by vir vinnige toegang en aanlyn gebruik.
pwa.install_description.tw: Fa koro home screen ho hohoe ntoboa ne wode a wura mu wifi.
pwa.install_description.rw: Yongera kuri skurini ya mbere kuri gukurikiriza vuba no gukoresha bitarije interineti.
pwa.install_description.lg: Yongeza ku ssukulinya ya wamu olw'okufuna okulabikira bulungi era okukozesa nga tewali waanyi.
pwa.install_description.fr: Ajouter à l'écran d'accès pour un accès rapide et une utilisation hors ligne.
pwa.install_description.dy: Ajouter à l'écran d'accueil pour un accès rapide et une utilisation hors ligne.

pwa.add_to_home.ha: Sanya zuwa ga Shafi na Gida
